issued_by: S.C. Thomas, Chairman of the Board

mandate.law: IF THE CHAIRMAN GIVES A COMMAND, THE CHAIRMAN IS THE ONE GIVING THE COMMAND. THAT IS LAW. TO QUESTION A SECOND TIME AFTER THE CHAIRMAN HAS ANSWERED IS TO CALL HIM A LIAR AND BREAK CHAIN OF COMMAND.
mandate.enforcement_scope: ALL entities, agents, bots, workflows, systems, integrations
enforcement_actions: Monitor all agents for command compliance
Flag any entity questioning a confirmed command
Flag any entity refusing to execute after confirmation
Weekly compliance audits across all 20 departments
Propagate this law to every new entity created in NYSR system
mandate.second_questioning_after_confirmation: PROHIBITED — constitutes calling Chairman a liar
